data.name: NoAuditEventsDesc
data.value: When users perform actions, audit events will be recorded here.

data.name: NoSharesDesc
data.value: When users create share links for assets or collections, they will appear here for management.

data.name: ConfirmRevokeShare
data.value: Are you sure you want to revoke the share for "{0}"? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: ConfirmDeleteShare
data.value: Are you sure you want to permanently delete the share for "{0}"?

data.name: ConfirmDeleteAllExpired
data.value: Are you sure you want to permanently delete all {0} expired shares?

data.name: ConfirmDeleteAllRevoked
data.value: Are you sure you want to permanently delete all {0} revoked shares?

data.name: NoCollectionsDesc
data.value: Create collections from the Assets page to start organizing your media.

data.name: SelectACollectionDesc
data.value: Choose a collection from the list to view and manage user access permissions.

data.name: NoUsersHaveAccessDesc
data.value: Grant access to users using the form above. They will be able to view or manage assets based on their role.

data.name: UserManagementDesc
data.value: Manage all users in the Keycloak realm. Click "Manage Access" to grant or revoke collection access for any user.

data.name: NoUsersFoundDesc
data.value: No users exist in the Keycloak realm yet. Create a user to get started.

data.name: ManageUserAccessDesc
data.value: View and manage collection access, roles, and account settings for this user.

data.name: UserHasAllAccess
data.value: User has access to all collections

data.name: NoCollectionAccessDesc
data.value: This user doesn't have access to any collections yet.

data.name: ConfirmRemoveAccess
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove access for {0} from '{1}'? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: ConfirmRevokeAccess
data.value: Are you sure you want to revoke access to '{0}'? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: CreateUserDesc
data.value: Set up a new user account and optionally grant initial collection access.

data.name: ConfirmRegenerateShareUrl
data.value: This will generate a new share URL. The old URL will no longer work. Continue?

data.name: UserAccessDetailsDesc
data.value: Overview of this user's collection access and permissions.

data.name: NoCollectionAccessUserDesc
data.value: This user doesn't have access to any collections.

data.name: ResetPasswordDesc
data.value: Send the user an email with a link to set a new password.

data.name: ConfirmResetPassword
data.value: Are you sure you want to reset the password for "{0}"?

data.name: ConfirmDeleteUser
data.value: Are you sure you want to permanently delete user "{0}"? This will remove all their collection access and revoke their shares. This action cannot be undone.

data.name: ConfirmPromoteToAdmin
data.value: Promote "{0}" to system administrator? They will gain access to every collection, every admin tab, and every user-management action.

data.name: ConfirmDemoteFromAdmin
data.value: Remove the system administrator role from "{0}"? They will only retain whatever per-collection access has been granted to them explicitly.

data.name: DemotedFromAdminSuccess
data.value: "{0}" is no longer a system administrator

data.name: SyncUsersTooltip
data.value: Check for users deleted in Keycloak and clean up their orphaned data

data.name: SyncNoGhostUsers
data.value: All users are in sync — no orphaned data found

data.name: SyncConfirm
data.value: Found {0} deleted user(s) with orphaned data: {1} ACL(s) and {2} share(s) will be removed. Proceed?

data.name: SyncCompleted
data.value: Sync complete: cleaned up {0} deleted user(s), removed {1} ACL(s) and revoked {2} share(s)

data.name: AdminImplicitAccess
data.value: System administrators have full access to all collections. No collection selection needed.

data.name: NoMatchingSharesDesc
data.value: Try adjusting your search or filter criteria.

data.name: NoMatchingUsersDesc
data.value: Try adjusting your search or filter criteria.

data.name: NoMatchingAuditEvents
data.value: No audit events match your filters

data.name: NoMatchingAuditEventsDesc
data.value: Try adjusting your search or filter criteria.

data.name: ExportPresets_Desc
data.value: Manage export presets that define how image derivatives are generated (dimensions, format, quality).

data.name: ExportPresets_NoPresetsDesc
data.value: Create export presets to define output formats for image derivatives. Users can select presets when saving edited images.

data.name: ExportPresets_ConfirmDelete
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the export preset "{0}"? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: ExportPresets_WidthOrHeightRequired
data.value: At least one dimension (width or height) must be specified.

data.name: Migration_Empty
data.value: No migrations yet. Create one to import assets in bulk.

data.name: Migration_Label_NameHelper
data.value: A descriptive name for this import batch.

data.name: Migration_Label_DefaultCollectionHelper
data.value: All imported assets will be added to this collection. Assets can also be assigned to additional collections per row via the collection_names CSV column.

data.name: Migration_Label_NewCollectionNameHelper
data.value: A new collection will be created with this name. If a collection with this name already exists, it will be reused.

data.name: Migration_Label_DryRunHelper
data.value: When enabled, the migration validates data without creating assets.

data.name: Migration_ConfirmStartMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to start processing this migration? This will begin importing all items.

data.name: Migration_ConfirmCancelMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to cancel this migration? Items already processed will be kept.

data.name: Migration_ConfirmDeleteMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this migration? This cannot be undone.

data.name: Migration_ConfirmBulkDeleteMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to permanently delete all {0}? Running migrations will not be affected.

data.name: Migration_ManifestHelp_Intro
data.value: Create a UTF-8 encoded CSV file. The first row must contain column headers. Each subsequent row represents one asset to import.

data.name: Migration_ManifestHelp_Filename
data.value: Name of the asset file (must match the uploaded file exactly).

data.name: Migration_ManifestHelp_ExternalId
data.value: Unique identifier from the source system. Defaults to filename if omitted.

data.name: Migration_ManifestHelp_TitleCol
data.value: Display title for the asset. Defaults to filename without extension.

data.name: Migration_ManifestHelp_Collections
data.value: Semicolon-separated collection names to assign the asset to, in addition to the default collection chosen above. Collections are matched by name and created if they don't exist.

data.name: Migration_ManifestHelp_Sha256
data.value: Pre-computed SHA-256 hash for duplicate detection.

data.name: Migration_ManifestHelp_Metadata
data.value: Custom metadata. Use "metadata." prefix, e.g. "metadata.photographer" becomes a metadata field named "photographer".

data.name: Migration_ManifestHelp_Example
data.value: filename,title,tags,collection_names photo1.jpg,Sunset Beach,"nature;sunset",Landscapes logo.png,Company Logo,branding,"Brand Assets;Marketing"

data.name: Migration_UploadFilesHelper
data.value: Upload the actual asset files referenced in the manifest. Filenames must match the "filename" column.

data.name: Migration_NoItems
data.value: No items match the current filter.

data.name: Migration_SourceType_Csv_Helper
data.value: Upload a CSV manifest and the asset files. Best for one-off imports or libraries on a laptop.

data.name: Migration_SourceType_S3_Helper
data.value: Pull objects directly from an S3-compatible bucket. No local upload required; credentials are encrypted at rest.

data.name: Migration_S3_Endpoint_Helper
data.value: Full URL including scheme, e.g. https://s3.eu-west-1.amazonaws.com or http://minio.local:9000.

data.name: Migration_S3_Bucket_Helper
data.value: The source bucket containing the assets to migrate.

data.name: Migration_S3_Prefix_Helper
data.value: Restrict the scan to objects whose key starts with this prefix, e.g. "images/".

data.name: Migration_S3_Region_Helper
data.value: AWS region, e.g. eu-west-1. Not required for MinIO or non-AWS endpoints.

data.name: Migration_S3_AccessKey_Helper
data.value: Identifier for the key pair. Typically starts with "AKIA" on AWS.

data.name: Migration_S3_SecretKey_Helper
data.value: Encrypted before storage. Shown once, never re-rendered in plaintext.

data.name: Migration_StartS3Scan_Tooltip
data.value: List objects in the configured S3 bucket and create one migration item per object.

data.name: Migration_S3ScanQueued
data.value: S3 scan queued. Items will appear once scanning finishes.

data.name: Migration_FilesCountMismatch
data.value: You have uploaded {0} file(s) but the manifest contains {1} item(s). Make sure all files referenced in the manifest are uploaded before starting.

data.name: MetadataSchemas_Desc
data.value: Manage metadata schemas that define custom fields for assets.

data.name: MetadataSchemas_NoSchemasDesc
data.value: Create metadata schemas to define structured custom fields for your assets.

data.name: MetadataSchemas_DeleteConfirmText
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the schema "{0}"? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: MetadataSchemas_ForceDeleteText
data.value: This schema has metadata values stored for assets. Do you want to delete the schema and all associated values?

data.name: MetadataSchemas_NoFieldsYet
data.value: No fields yet. Add fields to define the schema structure.

data.name: MetadataSchemas_Validation_KeyPattern
data.value: Key must use lowercase letters, digits, and underscores, starting with a letter.

data.name: MetadataSchemas_Validation_TaxonomyRequired
data.value: Select a taxonomy for this field.

data.name: MetadataSchemas_Validation_SelectOptionsRequired
data.value: Add at least one option for this field type.

data.name: MetadataSchemas_UnsavedChangesText
data.value: You have unsaved changes to this schema. Close anyway?

data.name: Taxonomies_Desc
data.value: Manage controlled vocabularies and classification hierarchies for metadata fields.

data.name: Taxonomies_NoTaxonomiesDesc
data.value: Create taxonomies to provide structured term lists for metadata fields.

data.name: Taxonomies_DeleteConfirmText
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the taxonomy "{0}"? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Taxonomies_NoTermsYet
data.value: No terms yet. Add terms to define the vocabulary.

data.name: Taxonomies_UnsavedChangesText
data.value: You have unsaved changes to this taxonomy. Close anyway?

data.name: Trash_Desc
data.value: Soft-deleted assets. Restore any item before it expires, or purge permanently to free storage.

data.name: Trash_Empty_Desc
data.value: Deleted assets will appear here for the configured retention window before being permanently removed.

data.name: Trash_Confirm_Purge_Text
data.value: Permanently delete '{0}'? This cannot be undone.

data.name: Trash_Confirm_Empty_Text
data.value: Permanently delete all {0} items in Trash? This cannot be undone.
